title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Digital Products Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator based in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, trying to sell ebooks, courses, or art, but PayPal and other popular platforms won't let you. This is a frustrating reality for many creators in restricted countries. You're not alone. In this post, we'll explore your options for selling digital products without relying on PayPal. We'll break down the pros and cons of each, and show you how to set up a successful digital store, even in a country with limited payment options.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for selling digital products, but they come with restrictions for creators in certain countries. PayPal, for example, has a list of 'high-risk' countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. If you're from one of these countries, you'll be blocked from creating a PayPal account. Stripe has similar restrictions, while Gumroad is more lenient, but still requires an account. Payhip is another option, but they charge high fees.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Gumroad, for instance, blocks countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan because of their 'high-risk' status. Stripe also has similar restrictions, making it difficult for creators from these countries to set up shop. PayPal is more restrictive, with a lengthy list of countries that can't use their services. On the other hand, NOWPayments, a cryptocurrency payment processor, is available in over 300 countries and territories, making it a viable alternative for creators in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, NOWPayments is the clear winner. With instant automated delivery, creators can get paid quickly and reliably. Gumroad and Payhip charge high fees, while Stripe's fees vary depending on the country. PayPal's fees are also high, and they charge extra for international transactions. NOWPayments, on the other hand, charges a flat fee of 1.5% per transaction, making it a cost-effective option for creators.
NOWPayments charges a flat fee of 1.5% per transaction, making it a cost-effective option for creators.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

NOWPayments' automated delivery capabilities are unbeatable. With their platform, creators can set up their store and start selling digital products in minutes. They also offer instant automated delivery, so creators can get paid quickly and reliably. Gumroad and Payhip require more manual effort, while Stripe's automation is limited. PayPal's automation is also limited, but they offer more flexibility in terms of payment options.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a creator in a restricted country, NOWPayments is the clear choice. With their instant automated delivery and low fees, you can set up your store and start selling digital products quickly and reliably. The Full Stack Bundle, which includes Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard, is the perfect solution for creators who want to set up a successful digital store, even in a country with limited payment options.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Gumroad and Payhip charge high fees, while Stripe's fees vary depending on the country.

Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
